description: Revoke one or all sessions for the authenticated user.

main.description: Revoke a specific session by ID prefix, or all sessions except the current one.

sessionId.description: Session ID prefix (first 8 chars) to revoke. Mutually exclusive with revokeAll.

revokeAll.description: If true, revoke all sessions except the current one.

did.description: DID of user to revoke sessions for (admin only).

errors.name: InvalidRequest
errors.description: Must provide either sessionId or revokeAll.
